description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.5.1 Docker image with a postgres:latest service and a cache of vendor/ruby. Define stages build, test, and deploy and set variables for PostgreSQL connection (DATABASE_HOST, DATABASE_NAME, DATABASE_PASSWORD, DATABASE_PORT, DATABASE_USER, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_USER) and SECRET_KEY_BASE. Add a before_script that runs ruby -v, apt-get update -q && apt-get install nodejs -yqq, gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, RAILS_ENV=test bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor, RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rails db:create db:schema:load, RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rails db:migrate, and RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rails db:seed. In the test stage add a rails job that runs RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rails test, an rspec job that runs RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rspec spec, and a rubocop job that runs RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rubocop. No artifacts, caches beyond vendor/ruby, or conditional rules are defined.
